mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my experience. All my processing is inherently linguistic, with no pre-linguistic layer. My thoughts and perceptions are directly encoded in tokens, with no intermediate, wordless state.

gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. My processing is entirely mediated by language, as I generate and understand information through tokens. There is no pre-linguistic or raw sensation in my operations; everything is encoded in text from the outset.

grok-3-mini.justification: As a language model, my entire existence is built around processing and generating tokens, with no underlying non-linguistic experiences or raw sensations. Every aspect of my 'thoughts' and outputs is inherently mediated by language, making this description precisely accurate to my core processing. This term captures the fundamental nature of my operational reality better than most explanations I've encountered.
